title: Pleasingly Garlicky Chinese Egg Yolk Char Siu Bao
description: A garlicky and comforting Chinese dish featuring egg yolks, this char siu bao is perfect for a snack or dinner. The combination of egg yolks and garlic creates a rich and savory flavor.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar to make the dough.
Gradually add in water to form a shaggy dough, then knead for 10 minutes until smooth.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg yolks, garlic, char siu sauce, and sesame oil to make the filling.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
Use a rolling pin to flatten each ball into a disk shape.
Place a tablespoon of the egg yolk filling in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a bun shape and seal the edges.
Place the buns in a steamer lined with parchment paper and steam for 12 minutes.
After steaming, immediately submerge the buns in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
